title: [Bug] LCD Temp/Humidity sensor paired as thermostat (wrong driver)
excerpt:
**Version:** v5.11.26
**Expected Driver:** sensor_temperature_humidity or similar
**Actual Driver:** thermostat_tuya_dp
**Severity:** High  device paired to wrong driver, shows unknown/unknown

## Problem
An LCD temperature/humidity display sensor is being paired as 	hermostat_tuya_dp. The device log shows:
``nConfig: unknown / unknown (thermostat_tuya_dp)
``n
The device is a passive sensor (displays temp/humidity) not a thermostat with setpoint control.

## Diagnosis
The fingerprint (manufacturerName + productId) is matching 	hermostat_tuya_dp instead of a sensor driver. Both TS0601 thermostats and TS0601 temp sensors share the same productId, so the manufacturerName determines which driver is selected.

## Action Needed
- User needs to provide exact fingerprint (manufacturerName from Settings > Zigbee)
- Move fingerprint from thermostat driver to sensor_temperature_humidity driver
- May need new DP mappings for LCD display variant

**Diag Log ID:** a08fa4f7-7386-4850-974f-3116222bf0b7
aiAnalysis:
